nasb.text: Only your holy things which you may have and your votive offerings, you shall take and go to the place which the Lord chooses.

esv.text: But the holy things that are due from you, and your vow offerings, you shall take, and you shall go to the place that the Lord will choose,

cnv.text: 只是你要把你應有的聖物和你的還願祭，都帶到耶和華選擇的地方去，

ccb.text: 你们要把圣物和还愿祭带到耶和华选定的地方。
